Title: chunkContent — Correctness Properties

Expected_Result: Content split correctly; chunks cover full content; overlap boundaries correct

Title: safeParseStructuredMap — Correctness Properties
Expected_Result: Always returns valid StructuredMapData object; never crashes

Title: parseEnhancedResponse — Robustness Properties
Test_Data: Valid JSON; old format; invalid JSON; empty strings
Expected_Result: Always returns valid structure with bounded arrays/strings

Title: analyzeTags — Full content sent to LLM
Steps_Summary: Call analyzeTags with 5000-char content; verify LLM receives full content
Expected_Result: LLM receives all 5000 chars; no truncation

Title: analyzeTags — Short content baseline
Expected_Result: Same behavior as current baseline

Title: analyzeTags — Content < 10 chars skip LLM
Test_Data: Empty string; short string; whitespace only
Expected_Result: Returns empty result; LLM not called

Test_Data: Content with keywords "Error: bug fix for login decision"
Expected_Result: fallbackUsed=true; tags from keyword extraction; summary empty

Title: analyzeTags — LLM unavailable triggers fallback
Preconditions: TagAnalyzerService; mockLLM rejects with connection error
Expected_Result: fallbackUsed=true; no crash

Title: analyzeTags — Context chain propagation
Steps_Summary: Call analyzeTags with context parameter; verify prompt format
Expected_Result: Prompt starts with "[Previous section context]"; content after "---"

Title: parseEnhancedResponse — Old format tags only
Test_Data: LLM response with only "tags" field (old format)
Expected_Result: Suggestions extracted; new fields default to empty

Title: parseEnhancedResponse — Invalid JSON regex fallback
Test_Data: LLM response is natural language text with tags
Expected_Result: Regex fallback extracts tags; new fields empty; no crash

Title: applyThresholdWithExtended — Pass through
Expected_Result: New fields pass through unchanged; fallbackUsed=false

Title: analyzeWithChunking — Merge results
Preconditions: Mock analyzeWithLLM returns different chunk results
Expected_Result: Tags unioned; summary from first chunk; deduplication works

Title: loadPreviousContext — SQL query behavior
Preconditions: TaskWorker with mocked engine; pre-seeded entries
Expected_Result: Context returned for valid prev; null for first section; null for '{}'

Title: Full CRUD lifecycle — TaskWorker structured_map
Preconditions: In-memory DB; mocked LLM returns full JSON
Test_Data: Entry with content source="/doc.md"; task created
Steps_Summary: Insert entry; create task; process via TaskWorker; check structured_map
Expected_Result: structured_map contains tags+summary+entities+actors+rules+extraction_meta

Title: Context chain — Section 2 receives section 1 summary
Preconditions: Two entries with same source; entry1 has summary
Test_Data: Entry IDs 1 and 2; entry1 structured_map has summary
Steps_Summary: Process entry2; verify loadPreviousContext was called
Expected_Result: context passed to analyzeTags; entry2 structured_map contains context_chain

Title: Backward compat — Old entry structured_map='{}'
Test_Data: Entry with empty structured_map; also null structured_map
Expected_Result: Entry processed without errors; structured_map now populated

Title: LLM timeout — Fallback extraction
Test_Data: Content: "Error: bug fix for login decision"
Expected_Result: Task completes; fallbackUsed=true; tags="error-pattern"

Title: Context chain disabled — No context
Test_Data: 2 entries with same source; entry1 has summary
Expected_Result: loadPreviousContext NOT called; no context in entry2 structured_map

Title: Context chain — Previous section LLM failed
Test_Data: Entry1 structured_map has tags only (no summary)
Expected_Result: loadPreviousContext returns null; section2 processed independently

Title: structured_map fail — Tags still updated
Expected_Result: tags updated; structured_map unchanged; task COMPLETED

Title: Chunking activated — Content exceeds context window
Steps_Summary: Call analyzeTags; verify chunking and merge
Expected_Result: analyzeWithLLM called 3 times; tags unioned; summary from first chunk

Title: Full cycle — File ingest to structured_map
Preconditions: Hono test server; LLM mock; TaskWorker started
Steps_Summary: Call mem_ingest_file; wait for processing; check DB
Expected_Result: 3 entries; all have populated structured_map; context chain links sections

Title: Context chain disabled — E2E
Expected_Result: No context_chain field in any entry

Title: Long document — Chunking triggered
Preconditions: llmChunkSize=6000; LLM mock returns per-chunk data
Expected_Result: Tags merged; summary from first chunk; no duplicates

Title: LLM fallback — E2E graceful degradation
Expected_Result: extraction_meta.fallback_used=true; tags via keyword

Expected_Result: Debug log shows context chain applied; context_length < 500

Title: structured_map > 100KB truncation
Expected_Result: structured_map ≤ 100KB; business_rules truncated to 5

Title: Race condition — Section N before N-1
Expected_Result: Race condition handled gracefully; no crash either way
